chips.description: ITE EC / SIO 芯片封装库，包含引脚复用、电压能力、GPIO 电气属性和章节来源。
features: 支持查看 GPIO、eSPI、LPC、SMBus、PWM 等接口
支持显示 1.8V、3.3V、5V tolerant 等电气能力
适合作为 EC 原理图调试和引脚核对的离线资料库

detail_entries.interface: 106 VFSPI I Standby Power Supply of 3.3V/1.8V
detail_entries.interface_cn: 电源引脚（VFSPI 3.3V/1.8V 待机电源）
detail_entries.summary: Core Power Bypass
detail_entries.summary_cn: 内核电源旁路
detail_entries.description: Core Power Bypass Internal core power output. External capacitor is required to be connected between this pin and VSS and physically close to this pin. The capacitor type must be low-ESR and MLCC is required.
detail_entries.description_cn: 内核电源旁路。该引脚输出内部核心电源。必须在该引脚与 VSS 之间外接电容，并尽量靠近该引脚放置；电容需要使用低 ESR 的 MLCC。

detail_entries.table: Table 5-13. Pin Descriptions of Serial Port Interface
detail_entries.interface: 35 RTS1# O2 Request to Send
detail_entries.interface_cn: UART / Modem 控制接口（3.3V CMOS）
detail_entries.attribute_description: 模拟输入 PAD。 / 带施密特触发的输入 PAD。
detail_entries.summary: Clear to Send
detail_entries.summary_cn: 允许发送
detail_entries.description: Clear to Send When the signal is low, it indicates that the MODEM or data set is ready to accept data. The CTS# signal is a MODEM status input whose condition can be tested by reading the MSR register.
detail_entries.description_cn: 允许发送。当该信号为低时，表示 MODEM 或数据设备已经准备好接收数据。CTS# 是 MODEM 状态输入，可通过读取 MSR 寄存器进行检测。

detail_entries.summary: Ring Indicator
detail_entries.summary_cn: 振铃指示
detail_entries.description: Ring Indicator When the signal is low, it indicates that a telephone ring signal has been received by the MODEM. The RI# signal is a MODEM status input whose condition can be tested by reading the MSR register.
detail_entries.description_cn: 振铃指示。当该信号为低时，表示 MODEM 收到了电话振铃信号。RI# 是 MODEM 状态输入，可通过读取 MSR 寄存器进行检测。

detail_entries.interface: 35 RTS1# O2 Request to Send
detail_entries.interface_cn: UART / Modem 控制接口（3.3V CMOS）
detail_entries.attribute_description: 模拟输入 PAD。 / 带施密特触发的输入 PAD。
detail_entries.summary: Data Carrier Detect
detail_entries.summary_cn: 载波检测
detail_entries.description: Data Carrier Detect When the signal is low, it indicates that the MODEM or data set has detected a carrier. The DCD# signal is a MODEM status input whose condition can be tested by reading the MSR register.
detail_entries.description_cn: 载波检测。当该信号为低时，表示 MODEM 或数据设备检测到了载波。DCD# 是 MODEM 状态输入，可通过读取 MSR 寄存器进行检测。

detail_entries.summary: Data Carrier Detect

detail_entries.description: Data Carrier Detect When the signal is low, it indicates that the MODEM or data set has detected a carrier. The DCD# signal is a MODEM status input whose condition can be tested by reading the MSR register.
detail_entries.description_cn: 载波检测。当该信号为低时，表示 MODEM 或数据设备检测到了载波。DCD# 是 MODEM 状态输入，可通过读取 MSR 寄存器进行检测。

detail_entries.summary: Data Terminal Ready
detail_entries.summary_cn: 数据终端就绪
detail_entries.description: Data Terminal Ready DTR# is used to indicate to the MODEM or data set that the device is ready to exchange data. DTR# is activated by setting the appropriate bit in the MCR register to 1. After a Master Reset operation or during Loop mode, DTR# is set to its inactive state.
detail_entries.description_cn: 数据终端就绪。DTR# 用于通知 MODEM 或数据设备当前已经准备好进行数据交换。将 MCR 寄存器中的相应位设置为 1 后，DTR# 被激活。主复位后或处于回环模式时，DTR# 处于非激活状态。

chips.description: ITE Super I/O 芯片封装库，包含 64-LQFP 引脚定义、GPIO 复用、GPIO 电源/寄存器能力和主要控制信号说明。
features: 支持查看串口、LPC、风扇控制、硬件监控、PCH / SMBus 等接口
支持显示 GPIO 复用条件、S3/S5 控制、内部上拉和方向控制
支持显示 3.3V、部分 1.8V 输入阈值与 5V tolerance 说明

封装图依据第 4 章 Pin Configuration 与 Pins Listed in Numeric Order 生成。
引脚说明详情来自第 5 章 Pin Description 表格。
GPIO 复用与寄存器能力来自第 6 章 List of GPIO Pins。
IT8613E 为 3.3V 芯片；部分输入阈值可通过 JP3 切到 1.8V。
当前模块覆盖重点：Wake / Power Control, Other, ADC / DAC, Fan / PWM。

features: 支持查看 128 引脚封装和 Pin Description 章节
支持显示 GPIO 复用条件、组别、位号和寄存器控制属性
支持按模块、信号、引脚快速筛选并定位到封装图

chips.description: ASM1061 是一颗 PCIe 转 SATA 控制器。这份资料不包含封装与引脚图，重点是 System BIOS 初始化顺序、关键寄存器和兼容性推荐值。
features: 支持 2 个 SATA 端口
支持 BIOS 直接配置 PCI / AHCI 相关寄存器
覆盖 SATA PHY、PCIe ASPM、SSC、AHCI CAP 与 64-bit Addressing 控制
chips.source_pdf: C:\Users\xyabc\Desktop\pdfAPP\EC&SIOAPP\PDF\Asmedia ASM1061 System BIOS Programming Note V4.2.pdf
chips.source_pdf_name: Asmedia ASM1061 System BIOS Programming Note V4.2.pdf

programming_items.title: 设置 SATA Controller Subclass
programming_items.summary: 通过 PCI RXEC[2] 打开只读寄存器写权限，修改 RX0A 以切换 IDE / AHCI / RAID 子类码，完成后再关闭写权限。

programming_items.title: 设置 Subsystem Vendor ID / Device ID
programming_items.summary: 同样通过 RXEC[2] 使能写入，然后把 RX2C~RX2F 改成客户自定义的 SVID / SSID。

programming_items.title: SATA PHY 兼容性优化
programming_items.summary: 在设备 Spin-Up 之前，为 Port 0 / Port 1 分别写入 PHY 参数，改善 SATA 设备兼容性。

programming_items.title: Spin-Up SATA Device
programming_items.summary: 通过 RXEC[1:0] 控制两个 SATA 端口 Spin-Up。IDE 模式必须设置，AHCI 模式建议设置。

programming_items.title: 内部稳压器设置
programming_items.summary: 若 ASM1061 使用内部 regulator，建议在 Spin-Up 前把 PWM 参考电压调到 1.28V。使用外部 regulator 时写该值无副作用。

programming_items.title: Feature Registers 推荐值
programming_items.summary: 推荐配置 RxFD / RxFE / RxFF 以改善系统兼容性、S4 唤醒、ATA/ATAPI 和 HDD 行为。

programming_items.title: PCIe L0s / L1 电源管理兼容性
programming_items.summary: 为兼容性，L0s 与 L1 active state 默认建议关闭。若启用 L1，则 RXFE[1:0] 必须同时设为 11b。

programming_items.title: AHCI 模式下关闭 eSATA / Hot-Plug
programming_items.summary: 为避免 Windows 把 HDD 显示在可安全移除列表中，需要把 HBA CAP.SXS 与两个端口的 PxCMD.HPCP 映射位清零。

programming_items.title: SSC 控制
programming_items.summary: 为了降低 EMI，推荐启用 SSC。先设置模式，再延时至少 100ns，最后拉起 enable bit。

programming_items.title: PCIe Max Payload Size
programming_items.summary: ASM1061 的 Device Control Register 默认是 128 bytes。不要设置成大于 256 bytes，否则与 Root Port 的传输会出错。

programming_items.title: System BIOS 编程时机
programming_items.summary: 所有关键寄存器应在 Cold Boot、Warm Boot、S3 Resume、S4 Resume，且在分配 PCI 资源之前完成。

programming_items.title: Shadow RAM Cacheable
programming_items.summary: 若系统使用 Legacy OPROM，应把 ASM1061 OPROM 占用的 shadow RAM 设为 cacheable，以避免 DOS / Ghost 场景性能明显下降。

programming_items.title: 关闭 64-bit Addressing Capability
programming_items.summary: 若 AHCI 64-bit addressing 存在兼容性问题，可清除 CAP.S64A，并把两个端口的 CLBU / FBU Upper 32-bit 清零。

notes: 这是一份编程说明，不是 datasheet 或 pinout 手册。
当前 PDF 未给出封装图、球位图、引脚定义或电气特性表。
适合作为 BIOS 初始化与兼容性调优资料卡接入芯片库。

chips.description: BQ25720 充电管理芯片功能封装图，包含 32 个引脚、中文功能摘要和主要电压范围。
features: 覆盖适配器检测、电池功率路径、SMBus 控制和 Buck-Boost 驱动引脚
左侧详情直接显示引脚功能中文摘要和推荐工作范围
适合做笔记本充电路径、限流与功率调试时的离线资料卡

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Charger input voltage.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 适配器输入电压引脚。
detail_entries.description: Charger input voltage. An input low pass filter of 1 Ω and 0.47 µF (minimum) is recommended.
detail_entries.description_cn: 适配器输入电压引脚。 工作范围：0V ~ 26V。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

pins.label: ACN

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Input current sense amplifier negative input.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 适配器电流检测负端输入。
detail_entries.description: Input current sense amplifier negative input. The leakage on ACP and ACN are matched. A RC low-pass filter is required to be placed between the sense resistor and the ACN pin to suppress the high frequency noise in the input current signal. Refer to 节 10.2.2.1 for ACP/ACN filter design.
detail_entries.description_cn: 适配器电流检测负端输入。 工作范围：0V ~ 26V。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Input current sense amplifier positive input.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 适配器电流检测正端输入。
detail_entries.description: Input current sense amplifier positive input. The leakage on ACP and ACN are matched. A RC low-pass filter is required to be placed between the sense resistor and the ACP pin to suppress the high frequency noise in the input current signal. Refer to 节 10.2.2.1 for ACP/ACN filter design.

pins.label: CHRG_OK

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Open drain active high indicator to inform the system good power source is connected to the charger input.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 开漏电源良好指示输出。
detail_entries.description: Open drain active high indicator to inform the system good power source is connected to the charger input. Connect to the pullup rail via 10-kΩ resistor. When VBUS rises above 3.5 V and falls below 25.8 V, CHRG OK is HIGH after 50-ms deglitch time. When VBUS falls _ below 3.2 V or rises above 26.8 V, CHRG OK is LOW. When one of SYSOVP, SYSUVP, _ ACOC, TSHUT, BATOVP, BATOC or force converter off faults occurs, CHRG OK is asserted _ LOW.
detail_entries.description_cn: 开漏电源良好指示输出。 工作范围：0V ~ 6.5V。

generic_info_rows: 开漏电源良好指示输出。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

pins.label: OTG/VAP/FRS

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Active HIGH to enable OTG, VAP or FRS modes.
detail_entries.summary_cn: OTG、VAP 和 FRS 模式使能输入。
detail_entries.description: Active HIGH to enable OTG, VAP or FRS modes. 1) When OTG VAP MODE=1b and _ _ EN OTG=1b, pulling high this pin can enable OTG mode. 2) When OTG VAP MODE=1b _ _ _ and EN FRS=1b, pulling high this pin can enable FRS mode in forward operation. 3) When _ OTG VAP MODE=0b, pulling high OTG/VAP/FRS pin is to enable VAP mode. _
detail_entries.description_cn: OTG、VAP 和 FRS 模式使能输入。 工作范围：0V ~ 6.5V。

generic_info_rows: OTG、VAP 和 FRS 模式使能输入。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

pins.label: ILIM_HIZ

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Input current limit setting pin.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 输入电流限制与高阻模式控制引脚。
detail_entries.description: Input current limit setting pin. Program ILIM HIZ voltage by connecting a resistor divider _ from VDDA rail to ground. The pin voltage is calculated as: V = 1 V + 40 × IDPM × (ILIM HIZ) Rac, in which IDPM is the target input current limit. _ When EN EXTILIM = 1b the input current limit used by the charger is the lower setting of _ ILIM HIZ pin and IIN HOST register. When EN EXTILIM = 0b input current limit is only _ _ _ determined by IIN HOST register. _ When the pin voltage is below 0.4 V, the device enters high impedance (HIZ) mode with low quiescent current. When the pin voltage is above 0.8 V, the device is out of HIZ mode. The ILIM HIZ pin voltage is continuous read and used for updating current limit setting (If _ EN EXTILIM=1b ), this allows dynamic change input current limit setting by adjusting this _ pin voltage.
detail_entries.description_cn: 输入电流限制与高阻模式控制引脚。 工作范围：0V ~ 6.5V。

generic_info_rows: 输入电流限制与高阻模式控制引脚。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

pins.label: VDDA

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Internal reference bias pin.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 内部参考偏置电源引脚。
detail_entries.description: Internal reference bias pin. Connect a 10-Ω resistor from REGN to VDDA and a 1-μF ceramic capacitor from VDDA to power ground.
detail_entries.description_cn: 内部参考偏置电源引脚。 工作范围：0V ~ 6.5V。

generic_info_rows: 内部参考偏置电源引脚。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

pins.label: IADPT

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: The adapter current monitoring output pin.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 适配器电流监测输出，也用于电感参数配置。
detail_entries.description: The adapter current monitoring output pin. V = 20 or 40 × (V – V ) with ratio IADPT ACP ACN selectable through IADPT GAIN bit. This pin is also used to program the inductance used in _ the application. Refer to 节 9.3.12 for selecting resistor from the IADPT pin to ground . For a 2.2-µH inductance, the resistor is 137 kΩ. Place a 100-pF or less ceramic decoupling capacitor from IADPT pin to ground. IADPT output voltage is clamped below 3.3 V.
detail_entries.description_cn: 适配器电流监测输出，也用于电感参数配置。 工作范围：0V ~ 3.3V。

generic_info_rows: 适配器电流监测输出，也用于电感参数配置。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: The battery current monitoring output pin.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 电池电流监测输出。
detail_entries.description: The battery current monitoring output pin. V = 8 or 16 × (V – V ) for charge IBAT SRP SRN current, or V = 8 or 16 × (V – V ) for discharge current, with ratio selectable IBAT SRN SRP through IBAT GAIN bit. Place a 100-pF or less ceramic decoupling capacitor from IBAT pin _ to ground. This pin can be floating if not in use. Its output voltage is clamped below 3.3 V.
detail_entries.description_cn: 电池电流监测输出。 工作范围：0V ~ 3.3V。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Current mode system power monitor.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 系统功率监测输出。
detail_entries.description: Current mode system power monitor. The output current is proportional to the total power from the adapter and the battery. The gain is selectable through SMBus. Place a resistor from PSYS to ground to generate output voltage. This pin can be floating if not in use. Its output voltage is clamped at 3.3 V. Place a capacitor in parallel with the resistor for filtering.
detail_entries.description_cn: 系统功率监测输出。 工作范围：0V ~ 6.5V。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

pins.label: PROCHOT

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Active low open drain output indicator.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 系统过载/限流告警输出。
detail_entries.description: Active low open drain output indicator. It monitors adapter input current, battery discharge current, and system voltage. After any event in the PROCHOT profile is triggered, a pulse is asserted. The minimum pulse width is adjustable through PROCHOT WIDTH bits.
detail_entries.description_cn: 系统过载/限流告警输出。 工作范围：0V ~ 5.3V。

generic_info_rows: 系统过载/限流告警输出。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

pins.label: SDA

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: SMBus open-drain data I/O.
detail_entries.summary_cn: SMBus 开漏数据输入输出。
detail_entries.description: SMBus open-drain data I/O. Connect to data line from the host controller or smart battery. Connect a 10-kΩ pullup resistor according to SMBus specifications.
detail_entries.description_cn: SMBus 开漏数据输入输出。 工作范围：0V ~ 6.5V。

generic_info_rows: SMBus 开漏数据输入输出。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: SMBus clock input.
detail_entries.summary_cn: SMBus 时钟输入。
detail_entries.description: SMBus clock input. Connect to clock line from the host controller or smart battery. Connect a 10-kΩ pullup resistor according to specifications.
detail_entries.description_cn: SMBus 时钟输入。 工作范围：0V ~ 6.5V。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Input of independent comparator.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 独立比较器输入。
detail_entries.description: Input of independent comparator. The independent comparator compares the voltage sensed on CMPIN pin with internal reference, and its output is on CMPOUT pin. Internal reference, output polarity and deglitch time is selectable by the SMBus host. With polarity HIGH (CMP POL = 1b), place a resistor between CMPIN and CMPOUT to program _ hysteresis. With polarity LOW (CMP POL = 0b), the internal hysteresis is 100 mV. If the _ independent comparator is not in use, tie CMPIN to ground.
detail_entries.description_cn: 独立比较器输入。 工作范围：0V ~ 6.5V。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Open-drain output of independent comparator.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 独立比较器开漏输出。
detail_entries.description: Open-drain output of independent comparator. Place a pullup resistor from CMPOUT to pullup supply rail. Internal reference, output polarity and deglitch time are selectable by the SMBus host. If the independent comparator is not in use, float CMPOUT pin.
detail_entries.description_cn: 独立比较器开漏输出。 工作范围：0V ~ 6.5V。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Buck boost converter compensation pin 1.
detail_entries.summary_cn: Buck-Boost 补偿网络引脚 1。
detail_entries.description: Buck boost converter compensation pin 1. Refer to 节 9.3.13 for COMP1 pin RC network.
detail_entries.description_cn: Buck-Boost 补偿网络引脚 1。 工作范围：0V ~ 3.3V。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Buck boost converter compensation pin 2.
detail_entries.summary_cn: Buck-Boost 补偿网络引脚 2。
detail_entries.description: Buck boost converter compensation pin 2. Refer to 节 9.3.13 for COMP2 pin RC network.
detail_entries.description_cn: Buck-Boost 补偿网络引脚 2。 工作范围：0V ~ 6.5V。

pins.label: CELL_BATPRESZ

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Battery cell selection pin for 1- to 4- cell battery setting.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 电池节数设置与电池在位检测输入。
detail_entries.description: Battery cell selection pin for 1- to 4- cell battery setting. CELL BATPRESZ pin is biased from _ VDDA through a resistor divider. CELL BATPRESZ pin also sets SYSOVP thresholds to 5 V _ for 1-cell, 12 V for 2-cell and 19.5 V for 3-cell/4-cell. CELL BATPRESZ pin is pulled below _ V to indicate battery removal. After battery is removed the charge voltage CELL BATPRESZ FALL registe_r REG0x1_5h() goes back to default. No external cap is allowed at CELL BATPRESZ _ pin. The device exits LEARN mode and disables charge when CELL BATPRESZ pin is _ pulled low (upon battery removal).
detail_entries.description_cn: 电池节数设置与电池在位检测输入。 工作范围：0V ~ 6.5V。

generic_info_rows: 电池节数设置与电池在位检测输入。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

pins.label: SRN

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: Charge current sense amplifier negative input.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 充电电流检测负端输入。
detail_entries.description: Charge current sense amplifier negative input. SRN pin is for battery voltage sensing as well. Connect a 0.1-μF filter cap cross battery charging sensing resistor and use 10-Ω contact resistor between SRN pin and battery charging sensing resistor. The leakage current on SRP and SRN are matched.
detail_entries.description_cn: 充电电流检测负端输入。 工作范围：0V ~ 19.2V。

generic_info_rows: 充电电流检测负端输入。

detail_entries.description: Charge current sense amplifier positive input. Connect a 0.1-μF filter cap cross battery charging sensing resistor and use 10-Ω contact resistor between SRP pin and battery charging sensing resistor. The leakage current on SRP and SRN are matched.
detail_entries.description_cn: 充电电流检测正端输入。 工作范围：0V ~ 19.2V。

pins.label: BATDRV

detail_entries.table: Table 7-1
detail_entries.interface: Pin Functions
detail_entries.summary: P-channel battery FET (BATFET) gate driver output.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 电池 FET 栅极驱动输出。
detail_entries.description: P-channel battery FET (BATFET) gate driver output. It is shorted to VSYS to turn off the BATFET. It goes 10 V below VSYS to fully turn on BATFET. BATFET is in linear mode to regulate VSYS at minimum system voltage when battery is depleted. BATFET is fully on during fast charge and works as an ideal-diode in supplement mode.
detail_entries.description_cn: 电池 FET 栅极驱动输出。 工作范围：0V ~ 32V。

generic_info_rows: 电池 FET 栅极驱动输出。

notes: 来自 8.3 Recommended Operating Conditions。

detail_entries.summary: Charger system voltage sensing.
detail_entries.summary_cn: 系统电压检测输入。
detail_entries.description: Charger system voltage sensing. The system voltage regulation maximum limit is programmed in ChargeVoltage register plus 150 mV and regulation minimum limit is programmed in VSYS MIN register.
detail_entries.description_cn: 系统电压检测输入。 工作范围：0V ~ 19.2V。
